2 4 3 4791 200000000 0.001
7 3 3 4791 2000000   2.01
8 3 3 4791 2000000   2.01


First line: # num of flows
src0 dst0 3 dst_port0 size0 start_time0
src1 dst1 3 dst_port1 size1 start_time1
...
TR change ‘dst_port’ from 100 to 4791
Please order the flows in ascending start_time!

下面是原拓扑的流量
2
1 3 3 4791 200000000 0.001
2 4 3 4791 200000000 0.001
7 3 3 4791 2000000   2.01
8 3 3 4791 2000000   2.01

第二个拓扑的流量
6
1 4 3 4791 200000000 0.2
2 5 3 4791 200000000 0.2
6 5 3 4791 2000000   0.21
7 5 3 4791 2000000   0.21
8 5 3 4791 2000000   0.21
